textByHash.809599eafb0d5ddb21c2c76d6d461f58ec785203: Hmm? What human do in troll kitchen? Burntmeat tired of cooking goats. Human look tasty.
textByHash.ee5a5ce04691bcf00f016c16b016042021beede0: Hmm. Burntmeat think you probably right. What human doing here?
textByHash.cc077c8b4f8d99107867bc1bde2b9bf2ced123c9: [laugh][laugh][laugh]! Burntmeat not give his greatest cooking secret away so easily.
textByHash.59a580ddb175e1aebf3e6ab06a78a54f1a48df89: But Burntmeat also has quest for human!
textByHash.e294af12ba618d4698e2bcd71e24f76cc1163a7d: Bring back a tasty human for Burntmeat's stew. If you find tasty human, Burntmeat will give you good reward.
textByHash.8b19156a635311b884df25e80d2458fe479d8539: Did you find tasty human? Burntmeat smell something good.
textByHash.3d55bd01321be86ca5d7e76501f8ed73ed39c0d8: Ah, dat look like nice tasty human.
textByHash.a7247451226fe7948aa855e7084bcb05234791e9: Yep, sound like human too. Burntmeat put it in stew. Good work, human. Burntmeat give precious reward.
textByHash.f4afe0684760f8b0a4f717e364c755fd97e36678: It first thing I ever try to cook! Very precious to Burntmeat.
textByHash.c724a3c2941ebfa81bf6b38c8afec8ad763cd875: Slurp, mmm... Human stew cheer Burntmeat up!
textByHash.6971ad272700cc913cd1eae58e6322b95f67f66f: Hah! Trolls pick it all until none left, many years ago. Only remaining stock in storeroom.
textByHash.a5bc47a7bb27edd536cd6c54d66f8c34b196de22: It well guarded, and Burntmeat hide key in fake bottom of kitchen drawer. Nobody find it there.
textByHash.f42c2ea21c56353c034b2596dac5c7fbb1bc0df8: Always humans running through Burntmeat's kitchen these days. It never used to be like dis.
textByHash.91ad9c6c5a8cfaa5079c853836586731628ac173: An' dat promise I is keeping! Never another human shall Burntmeat cook. Human taste plenty good raw if you add enough goutweed.
textByHash.9665bc4394fb73e10fb03b1d1c2710ce47eae4b9: Anyway, Burntmeat been hoping to see you again. Got important visitor here, an' we need your help.
textByHash.524f48b577db5ddea7809802c8136b84aac88285: So, you ready for another quest? You get good reward if you help us.
textByHash.4c9ec1f165f9f42c91cc5a4a712aabc06af99048: Silly human pretends he not liking lovely burnt meat! But okay, Burntmeat promises not to give you more burnt meat.
textByHash.8948aab96ccef75f704584089e769ecb9cce2e1a: Silly human pretends she not liking lovely burnt meat! But okay, Burntmeat promises not to give you more burnt meat.
textByHash.debde0c20f6eea91be1c259dccc2e5768c0a0334: Silly human pretends they not liking lovely burnt meat! But okay, Burntmeat promises not to give you more burnt meat.
textByHash.3ed90506afc03864c984c38c4994f2358242bf98: Good human! You not regret dis, Burntmeat is sure.
textByHash.c9fdee65b398c24280cefecac6c9aaa75db7a189: That correct! An' Burntmeat decided to send My Arm. He best troll to go to Weiss and teach stuff there. He already training assistant to take over goutweed farming.
textByHash.6cbf8585cb83bf9058df19417641ca6636204dbf: My Arm is good choice! He been to distant lands, met strange people, come back with new learnings for Stronghold. He obviously best troll for dis job.
textByHash.72f0133ef3cfed01fe8f2f2482ad4806b0362a3f: Wolfbone come from Weiss over icy mountains, but you not go that route. It too hard for Stronghold trolls. We not practiced climbing icy mountains.
textByHash.ed9fc36c32c4364a5583fc862d9019fb0bd055c6: Okieday, now you go fetch My Arm an' tell him where he got to go.
textByHash.2fde15f29d5c42cd8db86b10d4db45e66b9ba01a: Oh, it you again. I bin thinking 'bout you.
textByHash.a890f953917dee6040c80dd2612da02a01277caa: Ohhh, Burntmeat not finished thinking yet. Maybe next time you come here I tell you.
textByHash.1a2f5671f30dae24a7fb89c634a2f2395fca03c9: Well, Burntmeat need big important job doing, and you bin helpful before. You fetch Burntmeat tasty human for stew that time.
textByHash.af3ea876bb2cab0a24059e6d9509ffd7b91d8ae7: You remember you come in here asking me questions about goutweed, yah?
textByHash.6248e6e10f3b73e221178f63b00a31ca03672a3f: Yah. But Burntmeat is hearing where goutweed is growing again.
textByHash.dcd1738d0724318aa2facaf9cadc9dbe8e51bdd6: Well, I was cooking dis adventurer...
textByHash.9d9fd1746b76008bc944cf9c3a837e60efbb0a1a: Nah, silly red metal just hurt troll teeth.
textByHash.9451bd80cef7ec31fb1acf91c0dc3d0073ee6eee: Huh? What dis? You got goutweed here!
textByHash.eff88f854c83874830d3f0106860422ce70dedd6: Only place find goutweed is my storeroom. You bin stealing?
textByHash.864e79188a309e9f8bb484df02cbe46c78c12024: What say? Goutweed not grow now. Trolls pick it all.
textByHash.0edb614a1a5a203bd73eb42aadc2dd55f66f33f6: Humans grow goutweed? You lying to Burntmeat!
textByHash.4a57f29aaefebabecfa21247a396b7bbf7733380: Mmmm. Burntmeat think that sound good. But Burntmeat cook you first.
textByHash.81bafc98ebf36e5518bf3a76bd5d7b4794e165a2: Well, he give me mighty sore tummy later. I think I forget to wash his feet.
textByHash.11c4975a87a15a9bdd593796b4bb22fb5146e288: Ah! Der man I cooked, he say humans growing goutweed again. Now, if humans growing goutweed, maybe trolls can grow goutweed too, yah?
textByHash.99cfd59df75b797d07db8cfba8e74fc298018ae7: No, not me. Burntmeat stick to what he best at doing. But I got me an assistant wanting to learn farming. He called My Arm.
textByHash.cb4f6e5a572ad288841bb8f067f3fadb4de4dfd2: It a perfectly good troll name.
textByHash.996d7f770f21561a5f8edb38a0c98840222bbc25: You gonna help My Arm grow goutweed.
textByHash.cf2900d3083c286327468dd8ee3d51b4cced65a5: See, , if My Arm learns to grow goutweed, I get as much goutweed as I ever want. If dat happens, I promise you I never cook another human in my life.
textByHash.b43d6e170ac865458e4cab8734c08368f8d18ec1: Never. Burntmeat promises. Goat taste just as good as human if you add enough goutweed. Now you go talk to My Arm; he tell you what to do.
textByHash.8313e29fe07be0b3a9b629c53dd1d3a8d50cb2a8: Sorry, Player - Burntmeat chucked dat stuff away. It no good to eat. Red metal clothes hurt troll teeth, and big whip thing get stuck in throat.
textByHash.66f9d5c8525d083501b9f422301b8cebef1f0bcc: You go help My Arm now.
textByHash.c38f3daba06224d19d2fa1e3ebf0a361c838c4c0: Aww, now you done hurt Burntmeat's feelings.
textByHash.df4a7bbb155f3e041d1097d53454b58c9add4e24: If you not paying attention, Burntmeat not going to talk to you!
textByHash.ae6abff2d610d242f9fe35ce68744550e4a09c53: Yep, I remember. See, when you come here asking me 'bout goutweed dat other time, I tell you how we trolls had picked it all, and it not grow no more.
textByHash.1c22e12de408454008da08c637e4f19e1d645083: You get on with helping My Arm, yah?
textByHash.46affaad5f160386a3214ee1ddedf2cc41a247b7: How you an' My Arm getting on with da goutweed?
textByHash.139817bbed60a509576c8d8ac5cd17c1bc4186a0: Death Plateau, huh? Dat's quite a long way. Do you know how to get dere?
textByHash.c805c396f8b5bbd49e594eaf0b011f7a2d1d3b8e: Okieday. Just you mind out for dem troll cooks on Death Plateau - dey not as friendly as Burntmeat.
textByHash.fd60b7c66bde09ba0725265452a0370509a59e2c: Okieday, listen up an' Burntmeat tell you da best way to Death Plateau...
textByHash.7fd0c840f19eef652d67be2d727e8261da7a1aa1: You go out da north door of my kitchen an' walk all da way down da corridor.
textByHash.4428566255cbf1d6a9a4d46819fae9dd977511d2: Turn right at da end, and go down da stairs to da prison where we keep meat fresh.
textByHash.a6d8a423c2ad3b7499a8e87e1a1aacde525dbcd9: Yup. Can't keep people in crates like goutweed, dey go all dead an' smelly. Burntmeat tried it.
textByHash.538aeb73d7a7123e3261bdfd825931e0a50a7ab6: Walk straight through da prison. Da back door of da Stronghold is at da south end.
textByHash.d8df5db286e60fbd4d6f43b68f29676166b27277: Dat is correct. Now you gettin' outside...
textByHash.8fdde2d36185f7731378ce29564bcb48998d80a9: When you outside, you turn left an' go long way south-east along path.
textByHash.8b68f7a3cef323515928b6d2f1d84a6de8690274: At the end, you gotta turn left for Death Plateau. You got da special boots, so you gonna be okay on da rocks there.
textByHash.aa9d04e6acebf9a65554bf876d6cff6f26d4e4eb: At the end, you gotta turn left for Death Plateau. But watch out for da tricky rocks - maybe you gonna have trouble climbing dem.
textByHash.927e6cc5b2fc54137bf260e29ca3294c0def824c: Burntmeat heard where da humans going on Death Plateau wear funny boots to help climb rocks. Dey get da boots from little dwarf woman wot lives near da plateau. Turn right to go to her house.
textByHash.350d90b0898052ea09e873e7dc335987ab576ba7: Aww! You hurry up an' get My Arm what he wanting.
textByHash.8b3440798eccaf6ed589ead612cfcfa77d8194da: Da cooks on da plateau not as good as Burntmeat.
textByHash.1dcf180856e95728b48f3afaf2be345e41f871b6: Huh... Let me know when we got goutweed growing.
textByHash.4a15b52f5306498a86c6057bd9da83d9e513e0fc: So now we can grow goutweed whenever we want it?
textByHash.2754444772bbbd67c730314b13ada0626af0db2b: T'ank you so much! I dunno what we'd have done if you not come through here to help us.
textByHash.24ca69a5d66c5495d2d545f6ea048d20ddb115c9: Oh yup, Burntmeat cooked you SPECIAL reward.
textByHash.3ecf885958584103a85dd1b71f94db25118a0cdb: See, Burntmeat promised you a reward! Anyway, it been nice to see you again, Player. Enjoy your meal.
textByHash.ff24988ee3c42055414cc26a48334aa77086a151: Burntmeat hope you like your reward. It very special recipe Burntmeat learned when much younger troll.
textByHash.82c4517dd2b17c15201fe930a24943ba0f4a6fc8: Ah, you polite human. Off you go now and see what My Arm want.
textByHash.cebdfdefe7f007279089b11086541c6eb80a0570: Human so funny, pretending he don't like lovely burnt meat! Off you go now and see what My Arm wants.
textByHash.121eef0c1edb1ceb93b28852f1dcd72e013c1099: Human so funny, pretending she don't like lovely burnt meat! Off you go now and see what My Arm wants.
textByHash.14845b75ad61d34e53a5eb0149fdde6d44fca405: Stronghold trolls not all that interested in firemaking, after all, but t'anks for bringing book anyway. It taste lovely.
textByHash.99173822e7bcce80d4d956983bc0c5c646210430: Yeah, lotsa learnings here. Very clever stuff. We oughta reward you.
textByHash.3679b0385d71b5a04523fe5d925f5a4703a6f038: Silly human pretends he don't like Burntmeat's lovely burnt meat! But okay, Burntmeat will not make any more for you. Ever.
textByHash.0122ccec76d60504d725868d6689ef4f08d1f79b: No more burnt meat from Burntmeat, ever. Wolfbone here has made reward for you instead.
textByHash.d5f5b587c7588d4b6997a39304f810c28c3aa8a4: Burntmeat got feeling you no like Burntmeat's burnt meat. Burntmeat made some for you before, an' you not seem grateful. So Burntmeat will not make any more for you. Ever.
